reviewer.evidencePolicy: Only mark evidenceStatus=satisfied for deterministic behavior directly covered by the listed focused tests; keep skill behavior, live product quality, and possible-evidence satisfaction out of scope.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The binary's use of adapter audience hints and semantic group hints is deterministic claim-discovery behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime tests showing adapter audience_hints override portable path defaults and semantic_groups label claim review queues.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep adapter audience and semantic group tests aligned when changing claim_discovery adapter handling.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: Explicit instance discovery is deterministic CLI normalization behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by CLI smoke tests showing `kind: explicit` instance_discovery normalizes directly to the canonical catalog without a probe command.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep explicit instance discovery smoke coverage when changing eval live discover or adapter instance_discovery shape.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: The live-run invocation output path and result packet schema are deterministic CLI behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by CLI smoke tests showing `eval live run` writes one `cautilus.live_run_invocation_result.v1` packet to `output_file` and prints that path.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep eval live run CLI smoke coverage when changing live_run_invocation result writing.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: Evidence preflight non-satisfaction is deterministic review-input behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime tests showing possible evidence refs may be attached for review, but current labels keep `evidenceStatus=unknown` and cannot satisfy a claim.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep possible-evidence non-satisfaction tests when changing evidence preflight or review input assembly.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: Grouping hints are deterministic claim-discovery packet fields.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime tests showing claim discovery emits group hints and adapter semantic grouping labels.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep group-hint tests aligned when changing claim discovery grouping or semantic group rules.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: Claim status summary and action bucket reporting are deterministic packet behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by runtime tests showing status summaries expose satisfied evidence, action buckets, review/evidence breakdowns, and next-action categories for unresolved work.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep status summary and action bucket tests aligned when changing claim show or next-action grouping.

claimUpdates.whyThisLayer: Optimize proposal evidence provenance is deterministic packet generation behavior.
claimUpdates.evidenceStatusReason: Verified by optimize flow tests showing each prioritized evidence item carries a non-empty provenance packet and locator.
claimUpdates.nextAction: Keep optimize provenance assertions aligned when changing optimize evidence ranking or proposal generation.
